articles.title: Blackstone raises $1.75 bn in data centre REIT IPO
articles.description: Blackstone has successfully raised $1.75 billion through its initial public offering for a new trust focused on artificial intelligence infrastructure. This significant funding underscores strong investor interest in data centers driven by the AI boom. The trust plans to acquire established data centers valued between $250 million and $1.5 billion.

articles.title: Priorities and Challenges before Suvendu Adhikari government in WB
articles.description: After a massive mandate in 2026 Assembly polls, the task for the BJP govt in WB is to create employment, bring in industries and maintain law and order.

articles.title: MP pushes solar beyond sunset with battery and hydro-backed storage
articles.description: 250 MW Green Project Expected To Provide Assured Power During Peak Demand Hours

articles.title: Cable, DTH vs streaming: Battle lines drawn at Trai over FAST TV rules
articles.description: India's old television distributors and new digital companies are in a regulatory fight. The debate is about whether internet-delivered TV services should face the same rules as traditional cable and DTH. Traditional players want stricter regulations for new platforms. Technology companies oppose this. The government is seeking recommendations to frame a framework for these services.

articles.title: India plans central back office for rural banks amid rising AI risks
articles.description: The Indian government is set to revolutionize the landscape for Regional Rural Banks with the introduction of a central tech hub dedicated to digital service enhancements and fortified cybersecurity.

articles.title: 25 objections to DDCET answer key under review
articles.description: DDCET provisional answer key released; 25 objections under expert review. Final results expected by end of May; admissions registration likely in June.

articles.title: Gujarat: Non-scheduled medicine prices set to rise from July
articles.description: West Asia Conflict Triggers 30-50% Jump in API Prices, Hits Drug Margins

articles.title: Insurance cos expand war-risk cover in UAE as tensions rise
articles.description: War-risk insurance is now available for everyday consumers in the UAE. Insurers are offering new policies for cars, cargo, and travel. This expansion is driven by ongoing geopolitical tensions. Businesses are also reassessing their coverage for disruptions. Awareness of war-related risks is increasing among consumers and companies.

articles.description: Hapag-Lloyd posted a loss in the first quarter as lower volume and weaker rates hit earnings. The post Lower revenue, higher costs drive Hapag-Lloyd to loss ...

articles.title: RFBL Flexi Pack IPO subscribed 20.44 times on final day
articles.description: RFBL Flexi Pack IPO | The Gujarat-based printed multilayer flexible packaging material company is raising Rs 35.33 crore via initial public offering of 70.65 lakh shares.

articles.title: VMRDA to allot ₹9.9 crores for development works in Vizianagaram
articles.description: VMRDA approves ₹9.9 crores for development projects in Vizianagaram, focusing on parks, roads, and airport connectivity.

articles.title: Foreign Borrowing Filings Halve To $5.43 Billion In March Amid Market Volatility
articles.description: Data suggested that there were 19 filings for new projects totalling a borrowing of $1.14 billion.

articles.title: Hyderabad woman calls out ‘comp off’ culture at workplaces: ‘Where is work-life balance?’
articles.description: A Hyderabad woman questioned comp offs, saying work-life balance lost meaning when companies controlled her schedule.

articles.title: High insurance commissions need regulatory attention, says Irdai chief
articles.description: Insurance regulator says rising commissions and weak profitability are undermining policyholder value and sector resilience

articles.title: MP directs quick completion of PNG pipeline works in Udupi
articles.description: MP directs quick completion of PNG pipeline works in Udupi

articles.title: IDBI Bank, Union Bank shares: Analyst maps strategy, key levels investors should watch
articles.description: Sharing his views on Union Bank of India Ltd and IDBI Bank Ltd, Nilesh Jain outlined important support and resistance levels investors should monitor.

articles.title: Thuraiyur bus stand shifted to temporary site
articles.description: Thuraiyur bus stand relocates to a temporary site near Sorathur Four Road for redevelopment, enhancing passenger amenities.

articles.title: Cognizant enters race for EQT & Bain-backed Citius Tech as PE suitors drop out
articles.description: Feelers for the mega transaction may have been sent to other strategic players like domestic IT giant Infosys, who may also be evaluating the opportunity, sources told Moneycontrol

articles.title: Vishal Mega Mart consolidated net profit rises 45.88% in the March 2026 quarter
Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients consolidated net profit rises 10.50% in the March 2026 quarter
Saregama India consolidated net profit rises 25.38% in the March 2026 quarter
Nityanand Rai cuts convoy in Bihar, follows PM Modi's fuel-saving plea
articles.description: Following PM Modi's appeal to conserve fuel, Union Minister Nityanand Rai has asked Bihar to reduce his security convoy to just two vehicles. Other ministers and CMs have also downsized their convoys in a bid to save petrol and diesel.

articles.title: Winsome Textile Industries standalone net profit rises 12.82% in the March 2026 quarter
NLC India hits record high after reporting strong Q4 performance
articles.description: NLC India surged 15.62% to Rs 376.40 after the company's consolidated net profit soared 189.12% to Rs 1393.46 crore on 31.45% jump in revenue from operations to Rs 5042.46 crore in Q4 FY26 over Q4 FY25.

articles.title: WB Governor RN Ravi urges people to cut energy use amid West Asia crisis
articles.description: West Bengal Governor RN Ravi appealed to citizens to join PM Modi's call for energy conservation amid the West Asia conflict. He urged using public transport, carpooling, promoting domestic tourism, and supporting 'Vocal for Local'.

articles.title: Karachi faces milk crisis as farmers demand Rs 100/litre price hike
articles.description: Karachi is on the brink of a major milk crisis as dairy farmers threaten to halt production. Citing a 75% rise in costs, they demand a Rs 100/litre price hike, warning they will independently raise prices in June if authorities fail to act.

articles.title: Rupee to depreciate more if the conflict continues to linger: Report
Quick Take | The bill has arrived: What the 8.3% April WPI is really telling us
articles.description: The WPI surge is expected to flow into retail inflation (CPI) over the coming months through higher transport, freight, logistics, and imported input costs

articles.title: Vedanta shares extend winning streak to 4th day, hit 52-week high
articles.description: Vedanta shares hit a 52-week high of Rs 336 on the BSE in early Thursday trade, surging as much as 4% in early trade. The stock extended the optimism from the previous session, where it settled nearly 6% higher at Rs 323.10 apiece.

articles.title: IT Stocks Extend Decline For Fourth Straight Session Amid AI, Growth Concerns
articles.description: The continued declines in the tech shares has pushed the Nifty IT Index more than 40% below its all-time high reached in December 2024.

articles.title: Bengaluru Techies To Pay For Office Parking Now? New Proposal To Fix ORR Traffic Problem
articles.description: Employees of offices along Bengaluru's ORR corridor could be asked to pay for parking inside the tech parks if a new proposal by Bengaluru Traffic Police moves forward

articles.title: Despite Q4 net profit crash, Cipla shares rise 11% in two days: Factors behind the rally
articles.description: Cipla share price today: Cipla shares rose 11% in two sessions from Rs 1292 on May 12 to Rs 1432 in the current session. In today's session, the stock surged 8% intra day. Market cap of the firm rose to Rs 1.14 lakh crore.

articles.title: Despite Q4 profit crash, Cipla shares rise 11% in two sessions: Factors behind the rally
articles.description: Cipla shares rose 11% in two sessions from Rs 1292 on May 12 to Rs 1432 in the current session. In today's session, the stock surged 8% intra day. Market cap of the firm rose to Rs 1.14 lakh crore.

articles.title: Adani Enterprises jumps 7%, hits 52-week high; stock up 52% from March low
articles.description: Adani Enterprises stock hit a 52-week high of ₹2,665 and quoted 48 per cent higher against its rights issue price of ₹1,800 per share.

articles.title: Brace for higher gold prices and supply boom in grey markets after customs duty hike: SBI report
articles.description: 15% customs duty hike on gold imports is expected to raise domestic prices and potentially divert supplies through unofficial channels, according to SBI Research. This move could impact India's current account deficit, though gold's role as the sole driver is debated. Import volumes are projected to decline.

articles.title: Samir Arora-backed Helios Flexi Cap Fund increases stake in Tata Motors, Eternal, Paytm, 8 others in April
articles.description: Helios Flexi Cap Fund, backed by Samir Arora, boosted its holdings in Tata Motors, Eternal, and Paytm during April. The fund also increased its stake in eight other companies, including Hero MotoCorp and Bharat Electronics. Conversely, exposure was reduced in HDFC Bank, Reliance Industries, and Ather Energy. Titan Company and Axis Bank were added as new investments.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Lee Iacocca: 'The only rock I know that stays steady, the only institution I know that works, is the...' – Timeless wisdom by the man who developed Ford Mustang
articles.description: Lee Iacocca, a renowned auto industry leader, believed the family unit offers unparalleled stability. He witnessed major institutions falter, yet found consistent support in familial bonds. This wisdom remains relevant today, reminding us that relationships, not achievements, build life's strongest safety nets. Family provides comfort when other structures fail.

articles.title: Sensex down 500 pts from day's high, Nifty below 23,450: 6 key reasons behind market paring gains
articles.description: Sensex, Nifty declined from intraday highs amid profit booking, while a record low rupee also weighed on investor sentiment.

articles.title: Oil steadies as markets await outcome of Trump-Xi talks amid Iran war concerns
articles.description: Oil prices edged higher as investors awaited the outcome of ongoing talks between Donald Trump and Xi Jinping in Beijing, while concerns over the Iran war, Strait of Hormuz disruptions and persistent US inflation kept energy markets on edge

articles.title: Havana faces up to 22-hour blackouts as Cuba runs out of diesel, fuel oil
articles.description: Only a single large oil tanker, the Russian-flagged Anatoly Kolodkin, has delivered crude oil to Cuba since December, providing temporary relief to the island in April

articles.title: India Bans Sugar Exports Till September 2026 Amid Domestic Supply Concerns
articles.description: The ban will not apply to sugar exports to the European Union and the United States.

articles.title: Strong cues from GIFT Nifty point to positive start for D-Street
articles.description: Indian stock markets are set for a wider trading range ahead. High Brent crude prices and a falling rupee are key concerns for investors. Foreign institutional investor outflows are expected to limit market gains. The final phase of the Q4FY26 earnings season and specific policy support will offer stock and sector-specific opportunities.

articles.title: The expanding arc of collateral damage to the Indian economy
articles.description: West Asia conflict is becoming a multi-vector test of India’s resilience

articles.title: Stocks in news: HAL, TMPV, Bharti Airtel, Anant Raj, Zydus Life, Tata Motors
articles.description: Indian markets experienced a volatile yet stable session after a sharp sell-off, with the Nifty showing resilience. Key companies like HAL, Tata Motors, and Bharti Airtel are in focus due to quarterly results and news developments. Zydus Lifesciences is nearing a US acquisition, while Maruti Suzuki commits to green logistics.

articles.title: Why is market rising today? Sensex zooms over 800 points, Nifty above 23,650. Key drivers behind surge
articles.description: Indian stock markets are experiencing a significant rally. The BSE Sensex and Nifty 50 indices have climbed over 1 percent each. This surge has added over Rs 3 lakh crore to the market capitalization of BSE-listed companies. The markets are extending gains for a second consecutive session. This positive movement is occurring despite ongoing global and domestic challenges.

articles.title: Max Estates targets Rs 1,200 crore revenue from the next phase of Gurugram project
articles.description: Max Estates aims for Rs 1,200 crore revenue from its new project, The Terraces, in Gurugram. This development is part of Estate 361, a large project designed for all age groups. The Terraces offers residences starting at Rs 2.4 crore. The project emphasizes sustainability and includes amenities for hybrid workers.

articles.title: India bans sugar exports until September 2026 amid supply concerns: Report
articles.description: India Business News: The Centre on Wednesday prohibited sugar exports with immediate effect till September 30 or until further orders, as the government moved to curb dome.

articles.title: Global Market Today: Asian stocks, US futures climb on tech optimism
articles.description: Asian stocks advanced, mirroring Wall Street's record highs driven by a tech surge and strong corporate earnings. Investors are closely watching the US-China summit and geopolitical developments in Iran, while inflation concerns fuel bets on Federal Reserve rate hikes next year.
